name: Chocolate Brandy Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Devil's food cake mix with pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a large bowl, combine cake mix, 2/3 cup brandy, 1/2 cup water, oil, and eggs.
3. Beat with an electric mixer on high speed for 2 minutes, scraping down the bowl a few times.
4. Stir in 1 cup chocolate chips.
5. Turn batter into a well-greased 12-cup bundt pan.
6. Bake for 35 to 45 minutes or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. During the last 7 minutes of baking, prepare glaze by combining butter, remaining 1/3 cup brandy, corn syrup, brandy extract, and 2 tablespoons water in a small saucepan.
8. Cook over low heat, stirring occasionally, until butter melts.
9. Stir in the remaining 1/2 cup chocolate chips and powdered sugar. Simmer, stirring over low heat for 5 minutes.
10. Immediately after removal from oven, spoon two thirds of hot glaze over the cake.
11. Let the cake cool in the pan for 25 minutes, then invert onto a cake plate.
12. Reheat remaining glaze and spoon over the top of the cake.
13. Let it cool completely. The cake is best if made one day in advance of serving time to allow flavors to mellow.
